inputs.label: Project Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total contract value for the HVAC project. Based on industry practice for project budgeting.

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of HVAC equipment and materials. Referenced from RSMeans cost data.

inputs.label: Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost for installation. Based on prevailing wage rates.

inputs.label: Subcontractor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs for subcontracted work (e.g., electrical, ductwork). Common in HVAC projects.

inputs.label: Overhead Percent
inputs.businessContext: Project overhead as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 5-15% per industry benchmarks.

inputs.label: Contingency Percent
inputs.businessContext: Contingency reserve as percentage of total direct costs. Recommended by PMI standards.

inputs.label: Margin Target
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin for the project. Industry average 10-20% for HVAC.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted margin. Based on risk assessment practices.

thresholds.marginPercent < 5: Critical: Margin below 5% - project at risk
thresholds.contingencyPercent > 20: Warning: High contingency may indicate poor estimation

suggestedActions: marginPercent < marginTarget ? 'Review material and labor costs for reduction opportunities' : ''
marginPercent < 5 ? 'Consider renegotiating contract or value engineering' : ''
contingencyPercent > 20 ? 'Improve cost estimation accuracy to reduce contingency' : ''
